title: Costco Merch Concept Posters

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a premium fashion campaign board for a fictional Costco Kirkland Signature spring collection in collaboration with a K-pop idol group. Show four stylish young idols wearing oversized Kirkland hoodies, tees, cargo pants, hats, and utility crossbody bags. Use a dark editorial catalog layout with product lineup panels, detail close-ups, membership card, fabric badges, Korean and English campaign copy, and polished retail merchandising photography. The mood should feel like a high-end streetwear lookbook, with charcoal, cream, black, and muted beige tones, sharp product typography, soft studio lighting, and a complete brand presentation grid.
imagePrompts.title: Costco Merch Concept Posters

promptTranslations.zh: 梦想的工作是在 Costco 负责商品销售。我想我成功了。你们不应该给我 gpt 图片 2
promptTranslations.fr: Le travail de rêve est d'être responsable du merch chez Costco. Je pense que j'ai réussi. Vous n'auriez pas dû me donner l'image gpt 2
promptTranslations.ru: Работа мечты — отвечать за товары в Costco. Думаю, мне это удалось. Вам не следовало давать мне изображение gpt 2
promptTranslations.pt: O trabalho dos sonhos é ser responsável pelos produtos da Costco. Acho que acertei. Vocês não deveriam ter me dado a imagem 2 do gpt
promptTranslations.ja: 夢はコストコの商品担当になること。うまくいったと思います。 gpt 画像 2 を与えるべきではなかった
promptTranslations.ko: 내 꿈의 직업은 코스트코에서 상품 진열을 맡는 것입니다. 이번엔 제대로 해낸 것 같아요. 나한테 GPT Image 2를 주면 안 됐습니다.
